fields.label: Access Key ID
fields.description: Volcengine access key ID used to sign Jimeng AI requests. Create or manage access keys in Volcengine Access Key management: https://console.volcengine.com/iam/keymanage/.

fields.label: Secret Access Key
fields.description: Volcengine secret access key paired with the access key ID. Volcengine shows it when you create or manage keys: https://www.volcengine.com/docs/6291/65568.

fields.label: Session Token
fields.description: Optional Volcengine temporary security token used with STS credentials.

actions.name: get_image_generation_4_0_result
actions.description: Get the result of a Jimeng AI Image Generation 4.0 async task.

add_logo.description: Whether Jimeng should add a visible watermark.

position.description: The watermark position: 0 bottom-right, 1 bottom-left, 2 top-left, 3 top-right.

opacity.description: The visible watermark opacity between 0 and 1.

logo_info.description: Visible watermark configuration sent to Jimeng.

aigc_meta.description: AIGC metadata configuration embedded in generated content.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for querying a Jimeng image task result.

is_done.description: Whether the Jimeng task has reached the done status.

image_urls.description: The generated image URLs returned by Jimeng.

outputSchema.description: The Jimeng async image task result.

actions.name: submit_image_generation_4_0
actions.description: Submit a Jimeng AI Image Generation 4.0 async task.

items.description: A public JPEG or PNG image URL.

image_urls.description: Reference image URLs. Jimeng accepts up to 10 images.

prompt.description: The prompt used to generate or edit content.

size.description: The target output image area in pixels.

width.description: The output image width in pixels.

height.description: The output image height in pixels.

scale.description: The prompt influence strength between 0 and 1.

force_single.description: Whether Jimeng should force a single-image result.

callback_url.description: A public callback URL Jimeng should call when the async task completes.

return_url.description: Whether callback payloads should return image URLs.

add_logo.description: Whether Jimeng should add a visible watermark.

position.description: The watermark position: 0 bottom-right, 1 bottom-left, 2 top-left, 3 top-right.

opacity.description: The visible watermark opacity between 0 and 1.

logo_info.description: Visible watermark configuration sent to Jimeng.

aigc_meta.description: AIGC metadata configuration embedded in generated content.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for submitting a Jimeng image generation task. Use image_urls only when providing reference images. Do not send base64-encoded image content.

actions.name: submit_image_generation_4_6
actions.description: Submit a Jimeng AI Image Generation 4.6 async task.

items.description: A public JPEG or PNG image URL.

image_urls.description: Reference image URLs. Jimeng accepts up to 14 images.

prompt.description: The prompt used to generate or edit content.

size.description: The target output image area in pixels.

width.description: The output image width in pixels.

height.description: The output image height in pixels.

scale.description: The prompt influence strength between 1 and 100.

force_single.description: Whether Jimeng should force a single-image result.

callback_url.description: A public callback URL Jimeng should call when the async task completes.

return_url.description: Whether callback payloads should return image URLs.

add_logo.description: Whether Jimeng should add a visible watermark.

position.description: The watermark position: 0 bottom-right, 1 bottom-left, 2 top-left, 3 top-right.

opacity.description: The visible watermark opacity between 0 and 1.

logo_info.description: Visible watermark configuration sent to Jimeng.

aigc_meta.description: AIGC metadata configuration embedded in generated content.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for submitting a Jimeng image generation task. Use image_urls only when providing reference images. Do not send base64-encoded image content.

actions.name: submit_image_to_video_first_frame_3_0_1080p
actions.description: Submit a Jimeng AI Video Generation 3.0 1080P image-to-video first-frame async task.

prompt.description: The prompt used to generate or edit content.

seed.description: The random seed. Use -1 or omit it for a random seed.

items.description: A public JPEG or PNG image URL.

image_urls.description: First frame image URL. Jimeng accepts exactly one public JPEG or PNG image URL.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for submitting a Jimeng AI Video Generation 3.0 image-to-video first-frame task. Use image_urls only. Do not send base64-encoded image content.

seed.description: The random seed. Use -1 or omit it for a random seed.

items.description: A public JPEG or PNG image URL.

image_urls.description: First frame image URL. Jimeng accepts exactly one public JPEG or PNG image URL.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for submitting a Jimeng AI Video Generation 3.0 image-to-video first-frame task. Use image_urls only. Do not send base64-encoded image content.

actions.name: submit_marketing_video_agent
actions.description: Submit a Lilinque Marketing Video Agent async task.

product_name.description: The product name used to generate the marketing video.

product_img_url_list.description: Product image URLs. Jimeng accepts exactly one product image.

items.description: A public JPEG or PNG image URL.

model_img_url_list.description: Optional model image URLs. Jimeng accepts exactly one model image.
